summary: Completed testing of Raw Surf OS new features: Real-time story file uploads, Media Galleries with watermarking, Admin Dashboard, and Annual subscriptions. Backend API tests passed (16/19, 3 skipped due to user creation). Frontend UI verification complete for all features.

integration_issues.issue: Backend API has annual plans with 20% discount, but frontend PhotographerSubscription.js and SurferSubscription.js only show monthly plans. No toggle to switch to annual billing.

action_items: Add Monthly/Annual billing toggle to PhotographerSubscription.js and SurferSubscription.js to expose the 20% annual discount plans
Backend annual subscription plans are working correctly at /api/subscriptions/plans
critical_code_review_comments: Stories CreateStoryModal has file upload mode with progress indicator - VERIFIED
Gallery upload with watermarking - VERIFIED via API testing
Gallery purchase flow with 80% to photographer - VERIFIED via API
Admin endpoints properly protected with require_admin check - VERIFIED
Admin Dashboard shows Overview, Users, Logs tabs - VERIFIED
Sidebar shows Gallery link for photographers (Grom Parent, Hobbyist, Photographer, Approved Pro roles) - VERIFIED
Sidebar shows Admin link with red highlight for admins - VERIFIED
Annual subscription prices calculated correctly: Basic $19.10/year, Premium $95.90/year for surfers; Basic $172.80/year, Premium $288.00/year for photographers

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features verified except annual billing UI toggle)

seed_data_creation: Created test photographer, gallery items, and buyer users during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) CreateStoryModal has Upload File/Link URL toggle with file selection up to 50MB and progress indicator 2) GalleryPage shows photographer's gallery with watermarked previews and purchase flow 3) AdminDashboard has Overview/Users/Logs tabs with proper access control 4) Backend /api/subscriptions/plans returns monthly and annual options but frontend only displays monthly. Annual plans have 20% discount correctly calculated.

verified_features.POST /api/upload/story: PASS - Endpoint exists and accepts multipart form data
verified_features.POST /api/upload/gallery: PASS - Endpoint exists and creates watermarked preview
verified_features.GET /api/gallery/photographer/{id}: PASS - Returns photographer's gallery items list
verified_features.POST /api/gallery: PASS - Creates gallery item for photographers only (403 for non-photographers)
verified_features.POST /api/gallery/item/{id}/purchase: PASS - Purchase with credits works, 80% goes to photographer
verified_features.GET /api/gallery/download/{id}: PASS - Returns original URL for purchased items with download count
verified_features.GET /api/admin/stats: PASS - Returns platform statistics (403 for non-admins)
verified_features.GET /api/admin/users: PASS - Returns user list with filtering (403 for non-admins)
verified_features.GET /api/subscriptions/plans: PASS - Returns monthly and annual plans with 20% discount
verified_features.CreateStoryModal_file_upload: PASS - Shows Upload File / Link URL toggle
verified_features.CreateStoryModal_progress_indicator: PASS - Has upload progress bar in UI
verified_features.GalleryPage_UI: PASS - Shows gallery grid with price badges and upload button
verified_features.AdminDashboard_UI: PASS - Shows tabs (Overview, Users, Logs) and stats grid
verified_features.Sidebar_Gallery_link: PASS - Shows 'My Gallery' for photographer roles
verified_features.Sidebar_Admin_link: PASS - Shows 'Admin' with red highlight for admin users
